response.justification: Despite extensive full-stack and geospatial experience, the candidate lacks direct C++ or Rust development in routing, navigation, or geospatial data pipeline contexts, and shows no evidence of distributed systems work for routing tiles, real-time traffic integration, or low-latency map processing — all core requirements of the role.
strengths: Strong open-source geospatial project experience with GISCollective
Proven ability to work across diverse tech stacks and languages
Demonstrated passion for testing, CI/CD, and software craftsmanship
concerns: No commercial C++ or Rust experience in routing or navigation systems
Lack of demonstrated expertise in distributed systems, fault tolerance, or routing tile optimization
Primary tech stack is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang, not aligned with C++-centric pipeline requirements
